excerpt:
<details open>

mtmd: add chunks and fix preproc for qwen3a (#23073)

* mtmd: add chunks and fix preproc for qwen3a

* add attn_mask

* limit mtmd_chunk size (avoid blow up memory)

* correct audio tokens

* re-order the set_input case

* remove attn_mask

</details>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-bin-macos-arm64.tar.gz)
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-bin-macos-arm64-kleidiai.tar.gz)
- [macOS Intel (x64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-bin-macos-x64.tar.gz)
- [iOS XCFramework](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-xcframework.zip)

**Linux:**
- [Ubuntu x64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-bin-ubuntu-x64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu arm64 (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-bin-ubuntu-arm64.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu s390x (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9169/llama-b9169-bin-ubuntu-s390x.tar.gz)
- [Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan)](ht
